calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson II, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Petitioners Paogo Faalogoifo and Iaafeumalo Faalogoifo (parents) were present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the Minors Paogo PJ Lopati Faalogoifo McMuulin; Nu'u Kapone Faalogoifo McMullin; Falefuafua Neil Faalogoifo McMuulin; Ilasa Feka Faalogoifo McMuulin and Ropati Kane Faalogoifo McMullin, were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Oaogo Lopati Faalogoifo; Nu'u Kapone Faalogoifo; Falefuafua Neil Faalogoifo; Ilasa Feka Faalogoifo and Ropati Kane Faalogoifo.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
